message:
fix(spork): preserve transient severity for region/spawn capacity backpressure errors

SporkError severity classification flattened all spawn/start errors
into the same severity as their outermost wrapper, losing the
distinction between transient capacity backpressure (retry-safe)
and permanent configuration errors (retry-futile).

Fix: New region_create_severity() and runtime_spawn_severity()
helpers classify nested RegionCreateError and SpawnError variants:
- ParentAtCapacity / RegionAtCapacity → Transient
- ParentNotFound / ParentClosed → Permanent
- RegionAtTaskCapacity → Transient

AppSpawnError and SupervisorSpawnError severity now delegates to
these helpers for their RegionCreate and Spawn inner variants.

Tests: severity_transient_spawn_parent_capacity,
severity_permanent_spawn_parent_not_found,
severity_transient_region_task_capacity, and additional variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
